description: Configure NCH Copper Point of Sale to handle cash rounding for regions without small coin denominations (e.g., Canada, Australia). Enable cash rounding to the nearest 5 cents (0.05) using the 'Round to the nearest value' rule. Verify the configuration by processing a cash sale for a tax-exempt item named 'Washer Test' priced at $0.03 and a tax-exempt item named 'Bolt Test' priced at $1.00. Complete the transaction and leave the final receipt or transaction summary visible on the screen.
